title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Baidyanath - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Baidyanath - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Baidyanath has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Gurgaon office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Baidyanath:
Baidyanath is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Baidyanath!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
